name: cypress-quality-framework
description: Cypress-based test framework demonstrating E2E, visual regression, API, and Lighthouse auditing — built as a portfolio for quality engineering roles.

scripts.visual:baseline:headed: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('cypress-image-diff/screenshots/baseline', { recursive: true, force: true });" && cypress run --headed --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/visual/**/*.cy.js' --env updateSnapshots=true -- --disable-gpu --disable-dev-shm-usage --no-sandbox
scripts.visual:baseline:headless: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('cypress-image-diff/screenshots/baseline', { recursive: true, force: true });" && cypress run --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/visual/**/*.cy.js' --env updateSnapshots=true -- --disable-gpu --disable-dev-shm-usage --no-sandbox
scripts.visual:run:headed: cypress run --headed --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/visual/**/*.cy.js' -- --disable-gpu --disable-dev-shm-usage --no-sandbox || true && npm run visual:report
scripts.visual:run:headless: cypress run --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/visual/**/*.cy.js' -- --disable-gpu --disable-dev-shm-usage --no-sandbox || true && npm run visual:report
scripts.test:all: npm run e2e:run && npm run visual:run:headless && npm run audit:run

author: Lucas Nascimento
